decisions.decision: Phase 9 complete — all 6 plans executed and verified
decisions.rationale: MCP integration tests pass with 86% coverage; full project suite 419/0

next_action: Complete v1.0 milestone via /gsd-complete-milestone or begin v1.1 planning
context_notes: All 9 phases of the v1.0 milestone are complete. Phase 9 MCP Server Implementation was the final phase. The project now has: unified MCP package with stdio/HTTP transports, 4 real tool handlers (query, get, multi_get, status), SearchBackend with real DB connectivity, and 86% MCP test coverage. No active work in progress — this is a milestone boundary pause.
